scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WORKER,WEB -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @openchannel/api" "npm run dev -w @openchannel/worker" "npm run dev -w @openchannel/web"
scripts.dev:runtime: concurrently -n API,WORKER,WEB -c blue,magenta,green "npx tsx apps/api/src/server.ts" "npx tsx apps/worker/src/worker.ts" "npm run dev -w @openchannel/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @openchannel/shared && npm run build -w @openchannel/api && npm run build -w @openchannel/worker && npm run build -w @openchannel/web
scripts.build:service:api: npm run build -w @openchannel/shared && npm run build -w @openchannel/api
scripts.build:service:worker: npm run build -w @openchannel/shared && npm run build -w @openchannel/worker
